title: rosa tomentosa var. dumosa
intro: Rosa tomentosa var. dumosa is a lesser-known variety of rose plant, scientifically classified as a species within the Rosa genus. It is native to China and is characterized by its small, white flowers with a strong, sweet fragrance. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The leaves and flowers of Rosa tomentosa var. dumosa can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can provide health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system.
